title: The Alps! A Major Event in a Small Village
overview: Romeo wants to participate in the pole climbing competition, in which several boys compete to get a trophy placed on top of a pole. Meanwhile, Luini, a mysterious man known as the god of death, arrives in the village.

title: The Beginning of Fate - A Family in Flames
overview: The fire started by Luini devastates the only cornfield that Romeo's family has left. Romeo's family rush to the field to try to save the domestic animals, but Roberto injures his head while leaping out of the flames.

title: Goodbye, My Village
overview: Due to the injures suffered during the fire, Roberto's condition worsens to the point of going blind if he is not treated urgently.

title: The Boy in the Portrait
overview: After being treated by doctor Baresi, Roberto will recover and will not go blind. Romeo has sacrificed himself for the sake of his family and must now leave the village.

title: A Night at the Tavern
overview: Luini locks up the boys before crossing the lake by boat to get to Milan. Among them is Dante, who devises a plan to escape.

title: The Boat Sinks! Friendship in the Storm
overview: The boat in which Romeo and the others are traveling to Milan is hit by a storm and sinks.

title: The House Where an Angel Lives
overview: In Milan, Romeo and Alfredo are sold as chimney sweeps to different bosses, having to separate, but not before swearing eternal friendship. Romeo is taken by Rossi, his buyer, to his house, where he will start a new life.

title: A Gift From an Angel
overview: Cleaning chimneys is harder than Romeo could imagine. And worst of all is that when he comes home tired from work he doesn't get a piece of bread. However, an angel who lives in the house cares for him.

title: Moonlit Love Letter
overview: Romeo goes to clean Professor Casella's fireplace who, to thank him, gives him an illustrated book.

title: The Sketchbook of the Blue Sky
overview: Romeo manages to get the key which keeps his door locked, so he can go out to meet Angeletta, becoming friends.

title: Let's Be Friends
overview: Romeo watches from the rooftop of a house that one of the Wolf Pack members is ambushed by another gang of boys, but then the rest of the pack appears and a fight breaks out.

title: Vanishing Into the Foggy City
overview: Romeo finds Anselmo lying on the street and covered in bruises. Anselmo tells Romeo that he confronted Tachioni because he hates outsiders and wants to kick Romeo out of town.

title: Reuniun in the Underground Sewer
overview: Romeo fights the Wolf Pack, who think he has denounced them to the police, but is saved at the last minute by a masked boy.

title: Run Away!! Quickly!
overview: The carriage Romeo has sneaked into contains explosives that the robbers intend to use to blow up the police station and free their imprisoned friend.

title: Light the Fire! The Oath of Eleven
overview: After proving his innocence, Romeo's conditions at Rossis' house get better. Marcello gives him a day off and Romeo decides to search for Alfredo in the streets of Milan.

title: My Rival Is Alfredo!
overview: After a long time, Romeo and Alfredo finally reunited and joined other young chimney sweeps to form the Black Brothers fraternity with Alfredo in command to confront the Wolf Pack.

title: The Duel at San Babila Church
overview: Since the Wolf Pack has no intention of stopping picking on the chimney sweeps, the Black Brothers, fed up with running away, decide to stand up to them.

title: Reach the Morning Sun! The Song of Unity
overview: As retaliation for losing the fight at San Babila church, Michaelo was kidnapped by the Wolf Pack.

title: Grandma Is a Witch
overview: Marcello Rossi receives a letter from his mother, Mimi, announcing she will pay them a visit soon.

title: Grandpa Theo's Puppet Show
overview: Romeo and Angeletta meet the old puppeteer Teo and little Nana.

title: Angeletta's Secret
overview: Matteo tells the boys the story of Marcello Rossi and Angeletta: a countess named Isabella is the girl's grandmother.

title: I Finally Met Grandmother!
overview: Angeletta's greatest wish is to meet her grandmother, the Countess Isabella Montovani, before her serious illness progresses.

title: Goodbye, My Angel
overview: Angeletta's condition is deteriorating rapidly. The so-called Ice Queen Montovani wants nothing to do with her granddaughter.

title: Targeted Siblings
overview: In Milan, a wedding of the nobility is taking place and all rich and noble people of the area are invited. Even the king of Italy is expected to come.

title: Reunion! Bianca and Alfredo
overview: Alfredo and Bianca are still on the run from their relatives. Their aunt and uncle want the badge that Alfredo hid. This badge was bestowed on Alfredo's father by Carlo Alberto, the father of the current Italian king, and legitimizes the Martini's fortune.

title: A Proud Soul
overview: Professor Casella discovers that Alfredo's illness is worse than initially thought. Alfredo also knows that he will not live much longer.

title: The Beginning of a Long Day
overview: Alfredo wants to restore his honor before the King of Italy and accuse his aunt and uncle of murdering his parents. Unfortunately, the Wolf Pack lure him into a trap and lock him in the sewers.

title: Noble Alfredo
overview: Alfredo and Bianca are still trying to show in front of the King of Italy and expose the damage that has been done to their family.

title: Eternal Alfredo
overview: The big moment is here! Alfredo and his uncle Maurizio stand before the king of Italy. Both have badges in their hands, but only one belongs to the Martinis.

title: The Final Oath
overview: Romeo suffers greatly from the sudden death of his friend Alfredo. He sinks into a deep sadness and distances himself more and more from reality.

title: The True Treasure
overview: The circus is coming to town. The Black Brothers want to see it, but they only have enough money for a ticket.

title: A Wonderful Christmas Eve
overview: While working one day, Romeo falls from a chimney and breaks his leg. Professor Casella agrees to have him at his place until his leg heals.

title: To the Sky! Riding the Wings of Freedom
overview: Spring has fallen and Romeo's contract with Maestro Rossi is over. It is time for Romeo to say goodbye to Milan and return home in Sonogno.
